entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
PATCHY FOG
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 70S
CALM WINDS

AREAS OF FOG IN THE MORNING
MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 109 IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 70
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
